calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco's Motion for Default Judgment as to defendant Morris Sowards.

Appearances: Christopher Tirrell of the Office of the Treasurer and Tax Collector (628.652.6441) appearing for plaintiff; No other appearances.

The Court has reviewed plaintiff's ex parte application to continue the hearing as well as the motion for judgment. Mr. Tirrell confirms that one witness is unable to appear in person.

Having reviewed the motion, the Court is prepared to grant the request for default judgment, relying on exhibits A and B to the motion, and the declarations of Zoila Monzon and Karla Barcia.

The Court enters a default judgment in favor of plaintiff City and County of San Francisco and against defendant Morris Sowards in the amount of $82,508.67 with costs of $255.00 for a total of $82,763.67. Mr. Tirrell is to submit a proposed form of judgment. The ex parte application to continue the hearing is off calendar as moot.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
